rule.name: Zoom Rare Input Devices
rule.description: Detects rare input devices from Zoom logs. Actors performing Remote Employment Fraud (REF) typically use unusual device information compared to a majority of employees. Detecting this activity requires careful analysis, regular review, and a thorough understanding of the audio and video devices commonly used within your environment.
rule.query:
`zoom_index` microphone=* NOT (camera=*iPhone* OR camera="*FaceTime*" OR speaker="*AirPods*" OR camera="*MacBook*" OR microphone="*MacBook Pro Microphone*")
  | rare microphone limit=50
  | `zoom_rare_input_devices_filter`
false_positives: This is a hunting query meant to identify rare microphone devices.
